channel.title: Entertainment
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Entertainment, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: “The Golden Bachelorette” Couple Joan Vassos and Chock Chapple Share Wedding Update and When They Plan to Tie the Knot
item.description: The couple got engaged on the first season of the ABC series in 2024

item.title: Sarah Ferguson's Whereabouts Unknown After Ex-Husband Andrew's Arrest
item.description: Andrew Mountbatten-Windsor was arrested on suspicion of "misconduct in public office"

item.title: Bunnie Xo Shares What Type of Parents She Thinks She and Husband Jelly Roll Will Be to Their Future Kids
item.description: The couple are raising two children together: Noah Buddy and Bailee Ann

item.title: Hailey Bieber Reveals the 'Funny' Word Son Jack Blues, 16 Months, Won't Stop Repeating
item.description: The model and beauty entrepreneur shares her son with husband Justin Bieber

item.title: Jenna Dewan's Daughter Everly, 12, Looks All Grown Up as She Debuts Blonde Hair in Video Dancing with Mom
item.description: The actress shares her oldest with ex Channing Tatum

item.title: Jaguar Driver Crashes Into School Bus on Video, Later Arrested for DV at Home
item.description: An out-of-control driver slammed into the back of a school bus on a Florida street, shearing off his roof, somehow survived ... and later got arrested...

item.title: Queen Camilla Ignores Questions at Royal Outing About Ex-Prince Andrew's Arrest
item.description: Queen Camilla didn't waste time shedding any tears over former Prince Andrew on Thursday ... she was snapped carrying on with royal affairs just hours...

item.title: LaMelo Ball Spotted Dipping Into Lamborghini After Car Crash In Charlotte
item.description: LaMelo Ball was in no mood to be seen after his car crash in Charlotte ... new video obtained by TMZ Sports shows the Hornets hooper quickly dipping i...

item.title: 'Buffy the Vampire Slayer' Star James Marsters Finalizes Divorce
item.description: "Buffy the Vampire Slayer" star James Marsters is on his way to staking his way out of marriage number two ... he's finally settling his divorce from ...

item.title: Rashee Rice Ex Dacoda Jones Posts Heartfelt Message To Son After Accusing NFL Star Of Abuse
item.description: Dacoda Jones is keeping the focus on her little boy -- just days after accusing Kansas City Chiefs star Rashee Rice of abuse in a bombshell lawsuit. T...
